summary: Tested 4 fixes: 1) Environment badge hidden for non-admin - PASS, 2) Sidebar role-based filtering - PASS, 3) Master of Academics access - PARTIAL (frontend route issue for /cs/dashboard), 4) Commission Engine Course Commissions tab - PASS. Overall: 10/12 tests passed.

minor.issue: Returns 403 for master_of_academics_ role - Edwin can access /dashboard route but API calls fail

integration_issues.issue: ProtectedRoute for /cs/dashboard (line 254-256 in App.js) does not include 'master_of_academics_' in allowedRoles - Edwin gets redirected to /dashboard

passed_tests: Sales executive (Aleesha) - Environment badge NOT visible in header (correct)
Sales executive - Only sees My Self-Service and Sales sections on home page
Sales executive - Does NOT see Operations, Customer Service, Finance, HR, Security, Marketing sections
Sales executive - Sidebar shows only Sales items (Sales CRM, Sales Dashboard, My Commissions, Today's Follow-ups, Settings)
CEO (super_admin) - Environment switcher IS visible in header showing 'production'
CEO - Sees all 9 sections on home page (My Self-Service, Sales, Customer Service, Academics, Human Resources, Operations, Security, Finance, Marketing)
Commission Engine page - Has 3 tabs: Commission Rules, Course Commissions, Commission History
Course Commissions tab - Shows Courses (11), Addons (5), Upgrades sections
Course Commissions tab - Has 66 editable commission input fields
Course Commissions tab - Editing a value shows Save button, clicking Save shows success toast 'Updated commissions for Starter Course'
Edwin - Sees correct sections on home: My Self-Service, Customer Service, Academics, Operations
failed_tests: Edwin - Cannot access /cs/dashboard - redirected to /dashboard (ProtectedRoute missing master_of_academics_ role)
Edwin - /dashboard API calls return 403 (backend permission issue for BirdsEyeDashboard)
action_items: Add 'master_of_academics_' to allowedRoles in ProtectedRoute for /cs/dashboard (App.js line 254-256)
Update backend BirdsEyeDashboard API to allow master_of_academics_ role access
critical_code_review_comments: EnvironmentSwitcher correctly only renders for super_admin (Layout.jsx line 615)
visibleSections logic correctly filters sections based on user role (Layout.jsx lines 432-453)
CommissionEnginePage Course Commissions tab implementation is complete with editable fields and save functionality
App.js ProtectedRoute for /cs/dashboard (line 254-256) needs master_of_academics_ added to allowedRoles
context_for_next_testing_agent: 4 fixes tested: 1) Environment badge - working (only super_admin sees it), 2) Sidebar role filtering - working (sales exec only sees SSHR/Sales), 3) Master of Academics - PARTIAL (can access /mentor but NOT /cs/dashboard due to missing role in ProtectedRoute), 4) Commission Engine Course Commissions tab - fully working with editable fields and save. Key issue: App.js line 254-256 needs master_of_academics_ added to /cs/dashboard allowedRoles.
